Descriptions.Description: BELT FITMENT GUIDE
CV Boot Kit - Front Inner/Outer | Rear Inner - Honda/Kawasaki/Suzuki/Yamaha
40% higher tensile strength and 50% more abrasion resistant than conventional material, suitable for the high joint angles and demands of today's ATVs and UTVs
Kit includes two stainless steel clamps that are designed to be tightened without the use of special tools
Lithium-based molybdenum grease ensures good lubrication for long CV joint life

CV Boot Kit - without Cone Tool - Universal
Kit includes one universal boot, two stainless steel clamps, grease pack, and silicone cone lube and instructions
Lithium-based molybdenum grease ensures good lubrication for long CV joint life
Material is expandable, yet tough enough to be a permanent fix
Boot material stays flexible in extreme cold temperatures
Does not include reusable installation cone tool.
Two clamping diameters ensure a good fit on most vehicles. Universal fitment.
CV Boot Kit - EZ Trail - XL - with Cone Tool - Universal
Kit includes one universal boot, one reusable cone tool, two stainless steel clamps, grease pack, and silicone cone lube and instructions
Expandable universal CV boot, slides and expands over reusable cone tool for trail side CV boot replacement
Lithium based molybdenum grease ensures good lubrication for long CV joint life
Boot material stays flexible in extreme cold temperatures
XL version of the original EZ Trail boot designed to fit UTVs and large ATVs.
Two clamping diameters ensure a good fit on most vehicles. Universal fitment.
CV Boot Kit - EZ Trail - XL - without Cone Tool - Universal
Kit includes one universal boot, two stainless steel clamps, grease pack, and silicone cone lube and instructions
Lithium based molybdenum grease ensures good lubrication for long CV joint life
Material is expandable yet tough enough to be a permanent fix
Boot material stays flexible in extreme cold temperatures
Does not include reusable installation cone tool.
Two clamping diameters ensure a good fit on most vehicles. Universal fitment.

Wheel Hub - Rear - Honda
Reduces looseness in the wheel assembly caused by wear, even after new bearing installation
Restores tolerances and reduces play on bearing mating surfaces
Replacing bent or damaged hubs restores that factory-smooth ride
Includes bare hub without studs (stud kits available sold separately)

Oil Cooler - Polaris
Engineered to match the fit, form, and function of the OEM oil cooler for easy installation
Reusing an old oil cooler can let harmful debris into your new engine, which could lead to serious damage or even failure
Manufactured to exacting standards to deliver consistent, reliable performance in the harshest environments
Crafted from 93003 aluminum alloy for superior corrosion resistance and heat dissipation
Maintain optimal oil temperature to prevent overheating
Includes all necessary O-rings for a seamless, trouble-free installation

Steering Stem Bearing - Honda
Designed as a drop-in replacement to upgrade OEM ball-type bearings to taper bearings (where ball-type bearings are used by the OEM)
Designed as a replacement taper bearing seat (where taper bearings are original equipment)
Kits come complete with both upper and lower taper bearing cups and cones and seals (both top and bottom seals are included in most kits)
Tapered roller bearings decrease maintenance along with less wear and longer life
Steering Stem Bearing - Victory/Indian
Designed as a drop-in replacement to upgrade OEM ball-type bearings to taper bearings (where ball-type bearings are used by the OEM)
Designed as a replacement taper bearing seat (where taper bearings are original equipment)
Kits come complete with both upper and lower taper bearing cups and cones and seals (both top and bottom seals are included in most kits)
Tapered roller bearings decrease maintenance along with less wear and longer life

Designed as a replacement taper bearing seat (where taper bearings are original equipment)
Kits come complete with both upper and lower taper bearing cups and cones and seals (both top and bottom seals are included in most kits)
Tapered roller bearings decrease maintenance along with less wear and longer life

Kit includes all seals and bushings needed for a fork rebuild

Axle - Complete - 8 Ball - Extreme Duty - Rear Left/Right - '16-'23 Polaris RZR
Axle is 20% stronger than OEM, 50% stronger than competing aftermarket axles and last 12 times longer than competing axles
Axle features eight precision ball bearings with cage and race sizes that are up to 35% larger for greatly increased CV joint strength
Manufactured in facilities that are certified and meet the ISO 9001 quality manufacturing standard
Designed with a larger-than-stock chromoly axle shaft and low-profile allow clamps

40% higher tensile strength and 50% more abrasion resistant than conventional material, suitable for the high joint angles and demands of today's ATVs and UTVs
Kit includes two stainless steel clamps that are designed to be tightened without the use of special tools
Lithium-based molybdenum grease ensures good lubrication for long CV joint life

Kits includes one universal boot, reusable installation cone tool, two stainless steel clamps, grease pack, silicone cone lube, and instructions
Expandable universal CV boot; slides and expands over reusable cone tool for trail-side CV boot replacement
Lithium-based molybdenum grease ensures good lubrication for long CV joint life
Boot material stays flexible in extreme cold temperatures
Two clamping diameters ensures a good fit on most vehicles. Universal fitment.

CV Carburetor Rebuild Kit - '90-'99 Evolution Big Twin
Intended for closed-course racing only
Components included in the kit are based off of US models and discretion must be used when attempting to install the kit on a non-US model
NBR rubber material is used on all O-rings and rubber gaskets; NBR has excellent resistance to the ethanol used in today’s fuels

Includes all gaskets, O-rings, float bowl, carburetor cap, accelerator pump screws, extended fuel mixture screw (with spring, washer, and O-ring), accelerator pump diaphragm (spring and boot), float needle valve (FMK tip), emulsion tube, slide needle and main/pilot jets
Three main jets and three pilot jets that can be used to tune a stock machine or a modified one

Shift Cable - Ranger
Black PVC outer jacket for maximum flexibility and durability
Steel inner casing that is tightly coiled for low compression
A pre-lubricated nylon inner sleeve guarantees smooth operation and long life
All wire ends are bird caged prior to terminal casting for superior pull-out resistance
EPDM molded rubber components for high UV resistance and long life
Injected molded components are manufactured from high strength POM material

Designed with a larger-than-stock chromoly axle shaft and low-profile allow clamps

Axle is 20% stronger than OEM, 50% stronger than competing aftermarket axles and last 12 times longer than competing axles

CV Boot Kit - Front Inner - Honda/Kawasaki
40% higher tensile strength and 50% more abrasion resistant than conventional material, suitable for the high joint angles and demands of today's ATVs and UTVs

Cut taper manufacturing process creates a more consistent edge with fewer loose cord fibers vs ground taper

Universal Joint Kit - Kawasaki/Suzuki
U-Joints are cold forged from SCM-415 steel, precision ground journals are case hardened to HRC58-61
Pre-greased with hi-temp Lithium Complex 3 grease, zerk and grease channels in bearing cup evenly distribute grease
Kit includes cap plug to eliminate grease zerk for low clearance applications
Honda yoke assemblies have upgraded cross diameters from 17 mm to 19 mm and features stainless steel clamps and hi-quality neoprene rubber boots for long life and abrasion resistance

Shift Cable - Commander/Maverick

Steel inner casing that is tightly coiled for low compression

Injected molded components are manufactured from high strength POM material

Steering Stem Bearing - Yamaha
Designed as a drop-in replacement to upgrade OEM ball-type bearings to taper bearings (where ball-type bearings are used by the OEM)
Designed as a replacement taper bearing seat (where taper bearings are original equipment)
Kits come complete with both upper and lower taper bearing cups and cones and seals (both top and bottom seals are included in most kits)
Tapered roller bearings decrease maintenance along with less wear and longer life
